summary:
# 每日彙整報告

## 📰 今日重點摘要
1. Ripple聯合創始人支持美國參議員之子創辦的企業，顯示加密界與政治的關聯性。
2. 美國財政部對130多個與ISIS相關的加密錢包實施制裁，反映政府對加密資產監管的力度加強。
3. 俄羅斯計劃於9月推出數位盧布，可能影響全球貨幣市場的競爭格局。
4. 比特幣價格在疲弱的美國就業數據下突破62K美元，顯示市場的強勁需求。
5. 市場上空頭遭受重創，比特幣、以太坊及XRP價格均有上漲。

## 📊 市場概況
今日加密貨幣市場整體氛圍偏向穩定，總市值達到2.21兆美元，顯示出持續的資金流入。比特幣（BTC）價格為61,467美元，較昨日上漲1.35%；以太坊（ETH）也有4.12%的增長，價格為1,696.14美元。相較之下，BNB表現略顯疲弱，價格持平，僅有微幅變動。整體來看，市場呈現出一定的回暖跡象，部分主流幣種的回升可能吸引投資者的關注。

## 🔍 技術分析解讀
從技術指標來看，比特幣的RSI為45.16，顯示出市場目前處於中性區域，均線訊號為空頭，可能暗示短期內價格面臨回調壓力。以太坊的RSI則為49.5，接近中性，亦顯示出不確定性。相對而言，Solana的RSI為62.91，顯示其處於多頭趨勢中，短期內有較強的上漲潛力。整體而言，市場的技術指標呈現出不同幣種的分歧走勢，需謹慎觀察。

## 😱 市場情緒
目前市場的恐懼貪婪指數為19，顯示出極度恐懼的情緒，這可能反映投資者對市場的不安與謹慎。BTC的市場佔有率為55.74%，仍然主導整體市場，但市場情緒低迷可能抑制資金流入。社群的情緒普遍較為悲觀，需注意可能的市場波動。

## ⚠️ 風險提醒
隨著美國政府對加密錢包的制裁力度加強，加密市場的監管風險可能加大，特別是在地緣政治緊張局勢下，投資者需對潛在的政策變化保持警惕。此外，市場情緒的極度恐懼可能引發短期內的劇烈波動，投資者應謹慎操作，以降低風險。

## 🎯 今日觀察重點
1. 觀察俄羅斯數位盧布的推出對市場的影響及其可能引發的政策反應。
2. 監控美國的經濟數據發布，尤其是對於就業數據的後續影響。
3. 注意主流幣種的短期價格走勢，特別是比特幣與以太坊的走向。
4. 留意政府對加密市場的監管動態，尤其是與恐怖主義相關的制裁措施。

news.title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
news.summary: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

news.title: OpenAI Offers US Government a $42 Billion Slice of Itself: Report

news.summary_zh: 這一合作將使USDC的流通更加便利，促進數字貨幣的使用。

news.title: ‘I think we’re nearing the bottom’: Bitwise CIO says Strategy’s STRC selloff is part of bitcoin’s end-of-cycle dynamics
news.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan says Strategy's STRC selloff reflects the kind of "end-of-cycle" deleveraging that precedes a bitcoin market bottom.
news.title_zh: ‘我認為我們接近底部’：Bitwise首席投資官表示STRC拋售是比特幣週期結束的動態
news.summary_zh: Bitwise的高層認為市場正在經歷一個調整期，可能即將反彈。

news.title: Smaller tokens lead as bitcoin, sol rally in 'first real bounce of the selloff'
news.title_zh: 小型代幣領漲，比特幣和Sol在‘拋售的首次真正反彈’中上漲
news.summary_zh: 市場小型代幣表現強勁，顯示出回暖的跡象。

news.title: Solana Foundation launches framework for protocol-level governance
news.summary: The Solana Foundation launched a framework for protocol-level governance, enabling validators with at least 100,000 delegated SOL to publish new proposals.
news.title_zh: Solana基金會推出協議層治理框架
news.summary_zh: 該框架旨在提升Solana生態系統的治理效率和透明度。

news.title: SBI Crypto shuts Bitcoin mining pool after 5-year run
news.summary: SBI Crypto will shut down its Bitcoin mining pool on July 31 after more than five years, ranking 12th globally with about 2.2% of hashrate share.
news.title_zh: SBI Crypto在運營五年後關閉比特幣挖礦池
news.summary_zh: 該公司決定結束其比特幣挖礦業務，反映出市場的變化。

news.title: Bitcoin rises 4% to above $61,000 as inflation fears soften
news.title_zh: 比特幣上漲4%，突破61,000美元，因通脹擔憂減輕
news.summary_zh: 隨著市場情緒改善，比特幣價格回升至新高。

news.title: Yield-bearing stablecoin slowdown ends 3-year run for crypto-native products
news.summary: Yield-bearing stablecoin supply fell 15% in Q2 as sUSDe and sUSDS contracted, while Treasury-backed products including BUIDL, USYC and USDY continued to grow.
news.title_zh: 收益穩定幣的減速結束了加密原生產品三年的運行
news.summary_zh: 收益穩定幣的減速標誌著加密貨幣市場的一個重要轉折，影響了相關產品的發展。

news.title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
news.summary: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.
news.title_zh: OFAC制裁134個ISIS-K加密錢包地址，Tether凍結資金
news.summary_zh: 美國財政部制裁多個ISIS-K相關的加密錢包，Tether隨即凍結相關資金以防止資金流動。

news.title: FBI Director Kash Patel disclosed six-figure Strategy stock purchase months after trade: report
news.summary: FBI Director Kash Patel disclosed a six-figure Strategy stock purchase months after execution in a delayed federal ethics filing.
news.title_zh: FBI局長Kash Patel在交易數月後披露六位數的Strategy股票購買：報導
news.summary_zh: FBI局長的股票交易引發關注，因為他在交易後幾個月才公開這一信息。

news.title: ChatGPT developer OpenAI said to discuss offering U.S. government a 5% stake: FT
news.title_zh: ChatGPT開發商OpenAI據報討論向美國政府提供5%股份
news.summary_zh: OpenAI正在考慮向美國政府出售股份，這可能會影響其未來的發展方向。

news.title: Scattered Spider Suspect Extradited to US Over $8M Crypto Ransom Demand
news.summary: The teenager allegedly helped to breach a luxury jeweler and demand $8 million in crypto, as part of a crew tied to $100 million in ransoms.
news.title_zh: 散佈蜘蛛嫌疑人因800萬美元加密贖金要求被引渡至美國
news.summary_zh: 一名與加密贖金案件有關的嫌疑人已被引渡至美國，面臨重罪指控。

news.title: Live updates: Bitcoin holds above $61,000 as momentum stocks plunge to start quarter
news.title_zh: 即時更新：比特幣保持在61,000美元以上，動能股在季度開始時暴跌
news.summary_zh: 儘管動能股表現不佳，比特幣仍穩定在61,000美元以上，顯示出市場的韌性。

news.title: Taiko reopens bridge after $1.7M exploit, says users made whole
news.summary: Taiko restored bridge transfers after replenishing asset backing and completing security fixes following an 11-day network disruption.
news.title_zh: Taiko在170萬美元的漏洞後重新開放橋接，表示用戶已獲得補償
news.summary_zh: Taiko修復漏洞後重新開放服務，並承諾所有受影響的用戶都已獲得補償。

news.title: Metaplanet adds 2,823 bitcoin to holdings in Q2, bringing total to 43,000 BTC
news.summary: Metaplanet spent $222 million on the bitcoin purchase during the second quarter, translating to $78,608 per bitcoin.
news.title_zh: Metaplanet在第二季度新增2,823比特幣，總持有量達43,000 BTC
news.summary_zh: Metaplanet持續增持比特幣，第二季度再添2,823 BTC，顯示其對加密貨幣的信心。

news.title: Metaplanet buys another $170 million of bitcoin expanding treasury to 43,000 BTC
news.title_zh: Metaplanet再購1.7億美元比特幣，擴大資金庫至43,000 BTC
news.summary_zh: Metaplanet進一步擴大其比特幣資產，顯示出其在加密市場的積極布局。

news.title: Metaplanet buys 2,823 BTC, surpasses 43,000 in Bitcoin holdings
news.summary: Metaplanet bought 2,823 Bitcoin during the second quarter, reducing its average acquisition cost to $106,500 per BTC, and reported $10.9 million in revenue from its income generation strateg
news.title_zh: Metaplanet購買2,823 BTC，持有量超過43,000比特幣
news.summary_zh: Metaplanet的比特幣持有量突破43,000 BTC，顯示其在市場中的增長潛力。

news.title: Taiko fully restores cross-chain bridge just 10 days after a $1.7 million hack
news.title_zh: Taiko 在遭遇 170 萬美元黑客攻擊後僅 10 天內完全恢復跨鏈橋
news.summary_zh: Taiko 在短短十天內成功修復其跨鏈橋，恢復了用戶的信心。

news.title: OpenAI weighs 5% stake for US government amid Trump talks: FT
news.summary: OpenAI has reportedly discussed giving the US government a 5% equity stake in early Trump administration talks as Washington tightens AI model oversight.
news.title_zh: OpenAI 考慮為美國政府提供 5% 股權，與特朗普進行會談：金融時報
news.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在評估向美國政府出售部分股權的可能性，並與特朗普展開對話。

news.title: Solana launches onchain governance and sets entry fee at 100,000 SOL staked
news.title_zh: Solana 推出鏈上治理，入場費設定為 100,000 SOL 抵押
news.summary_zh: Solana 宣布啟動鏈上治理機制，並要求用戶抵押 100,000 SOL 作為入場費。

news.title: Avalanche Treasury stock plunges 73% since debut as company’s AVAX holdings lose value
news.summary: At the end of the first quarter, the company's management raised 'substantial doubt' about its ability to continue operations.
news.title_zh: Avalanche 財庫股票自上市以來暴跌 73%，公司 AVAX 持有價值下滑
news.summary_zh: Avalanche 的財庫股票自上市以來大幅下跌，反映出其 AVAX 資產的價值損失。

news.title: XRP edges higher as whale activity rises while retail traders stay cautious
news.title_zh: 隨著鯨魚活動上升，XRP 小幅上漲，零售交易者保持謹慎
news.summary_zh: XRP 價格小幅上升，主要受到鯨魚交易活動增加的推動，零售交易者則相對謹慎。

news.title: Bitcoin's long-term holders have returned to accumulation
news.title_zh: 比特幣的長期持有者已經重新開始累積
news.summary_zh: 比特幣的長期持有者再次進行資產累積，顯示出對市場的信心。

news.title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
news.summary: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.
news.title_zh: Robinhood 與 dYdX Labs 聯手推出新去中心化交易所 Arcus
news.summary_zh: Robinhood 宣布與 dYdX Labs 合作，推出新去中心化交易平台 Arcus。

news.title: FBI Director Kash Patel caught sleeping on required disclosure of six-figure MSTR investment: Report
news.title_zh: FBI 主任 Kash Patel 被報導在必須披露的六位數 MSTR 投資上睡著
news.summary_zh: FBI 主任 Kash Patel 被發現未能及時披露其六位數的 MSTR 投資，受到批評。

news.title: Ether, solana, dogecoin in the green after Warsh comments push bitcoin above $60,000
news.title_zh: 在 Warsh 評論推動比特幣突破 60,000 美元後，以太坊、Solana 和狗狗幣均上漲
news.summary_zh: 比特幣價格突破 60,000 美元，帶動以太坊、Solana 和狗狗幣的價格上漲。

news.title: France to strengthen response as crypto wrench attacks hit 77
news.summary: French Interior Minister Laurent Nuñez promised a “more ambitious” three-part plan to reinforce security measures for the crypto sector.
news.title_zh: 法國將加強應對，加密貨幣攻擊事件達到 77 起
news.summary_zh: 法國政府計劃加強對加密貨幣相關攻擊的應對措施，近期事件數量激增至 77 起。

news.title: Dubai crypto market hits 50 licensed firms after new VARA approval
news.summary: Dubai’s VARA has licensed its 50th crypto firm, though only 39 VASPs were fully operational at the end of 2025 as the emirate’s regulated market continues to expand.
news.title_zh: 迪拜加密市場在新VARA批准後達到50家持牌公司
news.summary_zh: 隨著新批准的VARA政策，迪拜的加密市場持牌公司數量達到50家，顯示出市場的持續增長潛力。

news.title: Analyst warns BTC could drop further after worst June since 2022
news.summary: The June close above realized price but below the 200-week moving average “signals the bear bottom is still ahead per prior cycles,” one analyst said.
news.title_zh: 分析師警告比特幣可能在2022年以來最糟的6月後進一步下跌
news.summary_zh: 分析師指出，由於市場疲軟，比特幣可能會在經歷最糟的6月後繼續下跌，投資者需謹慎。

news.title: Kalshi and Polymarket’s combined volume surges 75% to $45 billion in June amid World Cup fever
news.summary: Among the three, Kalshi saw the largest month-over-month increase in volume, growing 87.4% to $31.5 billion from $16.81 billion.
news.title_zh: Kalshi和Polymarket的總交易量在世界杯熱潮中激增75%至450億美元
news.summary_zh: 隨著世界杯的影響，Kalshi和Polymarket的交易量在6月達到450億美元，增長顯著。

news.title: Venice AI becomes unicorn after $65M Series A as AI privacy concerns grow
news.summary: The funding round is Venice AI’s first external capital raise since it launched in May 2024.
news.title_zh: 隨著AI隱私問題增長，威尼斯AI在6500萬美元A輪融資後成為獨角獸
news.summary_zh: 威尼斯AI在成功籌集6500萬美元後，因應AI隱私問題的關注而成為獨角獸公司。

news.title: Trumps’ American Bitcoin sinks 8.4% ahead of reverse stock split to stay listed
news.summary: The Trump sons' American Bitcoin hit a low on Wednesday ahead of the company’s reverse stock split, which aims to buoy shares and keep it on the Nasdaq.
news.title_zh: 特朗普的美國比特幣在反向股票拆分前下跌8.4%以維持上市
news.summary_zh: 特朗普的美國比特幣在面臨反向股票拆分前，股價下跌8.4%，引發市場關注。

news.title: Ark Invest scoops up $18 million in Circle shares as stock dips 41% over past month
news.summary: Circle dropped 1% today after falling nearly 18% on Tuesday following the launch of the rival stablecoin project OUSD.
news.title_zh: Ark Invest在Circle股票下跌41%後收購1800萬美元股份
news.summary_zh: Ark Invest在Circle股票近期下跌41%之際，積極收購1800萬美元的股份，顯示出對未來的信心。
